model_specification_line: smf.ols('full_time ~ daca_eligible * post + C(statefip) + C(year) + age', data=df).fit(cov_type='HC1')
sample_selection: Not a US citizen (proxy for undocumented): citizen == 3
Immigrated to the US between 1970 and 2007 (yrimmig >= 1970 and yrimmig <= 2007)
Age at arrival 0-21 years (treatment: arrived before 16; control: arrived at 16-21)
Born 1982 or later (birthyr >= 1982; under 31 as of June 15, 2012)
Working age at survey time: 18-35 years old
treatment_definition: (df['age_at_arrival'] <= 15).astype('int8')  # age_at_arrival = yrimmig - birthyr; sample restricted to birthyr >= 1982 (under 31 on June 15, 2012)
